XenotypeDef.label: resurgent
XenotypeDef.description:
Resurgents are immortal super-humans powered by archotech-created archites in the bloodstream. They are an undead sub-xenotype. Despite their partial immortality, they are quite weak and slow. They are always quite calm. They can withstand almost any temperature. And under the right conditions, they can practically do without food. Their main advantage is the ability to resurrect the dead, turning them into archite-undead — thralls.
<color=#f5ffa2>Gameplay Effect (Thrall maker):</color> Can raise thralls. Thralls are mutants that do not age and, depending on their body's state, may not require sleep or food. Upon resurrection, their state is frozen. Skeletons will not grow flesh, but they do not require sleep.
XenotypeDef.descriptionShort: Resurgents are immortal super-humans powered by archotech-created archites in the bloodstream. They are an undead sub-xenotype. Despite their partial immortality, they are quite weak and slow. They are always quite calm. They can withstand almost any temperature. And under the right conditions, they can practically do without food. Their main advantage is the ability to resurrect the dead, turning them into archite-undead — thralls.
